Positioning Test Fixture

position: relative

Relative: top:20, left:30

position: absolute

Top-Left
Top-Right
Bottom-Left
Bottom-Right

z-index Stacking

z:1 (red)
z:2 (blue)
z:3 (green)

Float

Float Left

This text wraps around the left-floated element. It should flow to the right side of the blue box and continue below when there is not enough horizontal space.

Float Right

This text wraps around the right-floated element. It should flow to the left side of the pink box.

Clear

Floated
Cleared element below the float.

overflow: hidden

This content is inside a 200x80 box with overflow hidden. Any text that extends beyond the boundary should be clipped and not visible outside the container bounds. Extra text here to ensure clipping occurs.
